name: Amlodipine 5 mg
description: Calcium channel blocker used to treat high blood pressure (hypertension) and angina. Take once daily as prescribed. Store below 30 °C in a dry place.

name: Amoxicillin 500 mg
description: Broad-spectrum penicillin antibiotic for bacterial infections of the ear, nose, throat, urinary tract, and skin. Complete the full course even if you feel better.

name: Azithromycin 500 mg
description: Macrolide antibiotic effective against respiratory tract infections, skin infections, and sexually transmitted diseases. Usually taken as a 3-day or 5-day course.

name: Cetirizine 10 mg
description: Second-generation antihistamine for allergic rhinitis, hay fever, and urticaria. Provides 24-hour relief from sneezing, runny nose, and itchy eyes. May cause mild drowsiness.

name: Clotrimazole Cream 1 %
description: Topical antifungal cream for athlete's foot, ringworm, jock itch, and yeast infections. Apply a thin layer to the affected area twice daily for 2-4 weeks.

name: Ibuprofen 400 mg
description: Non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) for pain relief, fever reduction, and inflammation. Effective for headaches, dental pain, menstrual cramps, and muscle aches. Take with food.

name: Metformin 500 mg
description: First-line oral medication for type 2 diabetes. Helps control blood sugar levels by improving insulin sensitivity. Take with meals to reduce gastrointestinal side effects.

name: Omeprazole 20 mg
description: Proton pump inhibitor (PPI) for gastric and duodenal ulcers, GERD, and acid reflux. Take 30 minutes before breakfast. Do not crush or chew the capsule.

name: Paracetamol 500 mg
description: Widely used analgesic and antipyretic for mild to moderate pain and fever. Safe when used at recommended doses. Do not exceed 4 g per day. Avoid with alcohol.

name: Vitamin D3 60,000 IU
description: High-dose vitamin D supplement for treating deficiency. Usually taken once weekly for 8 weeks, then monthly maintenance. Helps calcium absorption and supports bone health.

name: Celin 500 mg Chewable Tablet
description: Chewable Vitamin C tablet for immune support, collagen formation, and antioxidant defence. Commonly used during seasonal flu, cold, and for general immunity boosting. Orange flavoured. Take 1–2 tablets daily or as directed by physician. Store in a cool, dry place away from sunlight.

name: Evion 400 mg Capsule
description: Vitamin E soft gelatin capsule widely used for skin health, hair care, and as an antioxidant. Helps protect cells from oxidative stress and supports cardiovascular health. Can be taken orally or applied topically on skin and hair. Take 1 capsule daily after meals or as directed by physician.
